The Northern Pacific for a long
time has been seeking route to
Portland that would be shorter than
the one at the present time in opera
ton via Puget sound. If they should
decide to build from Yakima they
would pass through a section of coun-
try in this state that would be of
great worth for local business.


The main reason though for build
ing the road Is that the Northern
Pacific has In that section Of the
country very large amount of land
grant which has not yet been dis
posed Of Most of 1t Is good timber
land. and the Northern Pacific does
not want small lines or roads built
by private capital to get into it's owr
territory and take away from it q
good share of the business Of the
future.
